article_theme: The architectural evolution of datacenter CPUs from the PC era to the AI-driven Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Agentic era, highlighting the shift in interconnect topologies, the explosion of custom silicon, and the constraints of DRAM supply on future roadmaps.
structure_summary: The article begins with a chronological history of datacenter CPUs (PC era to RL/Agentic era), transitions into a deeply technical analysis of multi-core interconnect evolution (Crossbar, Ring, Mesh), provides a comprehensive vendor-by-vendor breakdown of 2026+ CPU architectures and roadmaps, and concludes with market dynamics regarding BoM costs, DRAM constraints, and future design trends.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: The Role and Evolution of Datacenter CPUs
sections.section_role: Hooks the reader by outlining the current datacenter landscape, introducing the shift to RL/Agentic workloads, DRAM constraints, and teasing the comprehensive 2026+ vendor roadmaps.
translation_notes: Ensure codenames (Venice, Verano, Florence, Diamond Rapids, Coral Rapids, Phoenix, Venom) are kept in English or use standard industry transliterations.
Maintain the premium, insider tone of the paywall teaser ('For our subscribers...').
Translate 'Context Memory Storage' precisely, as it is a specific technical paradigm introduced by NVIDIA's Bluefield-4.

sections.title: The Role and Evolution of Datacenter CPUs
sections.section_role: Serves as a thematic bridge, defining the baseline function of datacenter CPUs to anchor the subsequent chronological deep dive.
translation_notes: Keep the definition of 'datacenter CPUs' strictly separated from consumer desktop processors in terminology (e.g., 数据中心CPU vs 消费级处理器).

sections.title: The PC Era
sections.previous_section_title: The Role and Evolution of Datacenter CPUs
sections.section_role: Chronicles the origin of the modern datacenter CPU, explaining how cost-effective PC architectures usurped legacy mainframes.
translation_notes: Translate 'mainframe replacements' accurately (大型机替代品).
Ensure legacy hardware terms like 'i386', 'i486', and 'L2 cache dies' use standard localized nomenclature (e.g., L2缓存裸片/芯片).

sections.title: The Dot Com Era
sections.next_section_title: The Virtualization and Cloud Computing Hyperscaler Era
sections.section_role: Explains the architectural pivot from frequency scaling to multi-core designs driven by the internet boom and physical semiconductor limits.
translation_notes: Translate 'Dennard scaling' as '登纳德缩放定律'.
Ensure 'GHz wars' reflects the historical context (主频大战).
Use standard industry acronyms alongside their Chinese equivalents for 'SMT' (同步多线程) and 'QPI' (快速通道互联).

sections.title: The Virtualization and Cloud Computing Hyperscaler Era
sections.next_section_title: The AI GPU and CPU Consolidation Era
sections.section_role: Details the hyperscaler revolution and the business shift from CapEx to OpEx, while highlighting critical architectural vulnerabilities that impacted performance.
translation_notes: Translate 'traded CapEx for OpEx' cleanly (将资本支出转化为运营支出).
Use 'Hyperscalers' (超大规模云服务商) consistently.
Carefully manage the tone regarding Intel's 'untimely design decisions' to maintain objective, analytical framing.

sections.title: The AI GPU and CPU Consolidation Era
sections.previous_section_title: The Virtualization and Cloud Computing Hyperscaler Era
sections.section_role: Describes the peak of traditional CPU shipments and the industry's pivot toward highly efficient, cloud-native CPUs amidst the rise of AI accelerators.
translation_notes: Translate 'Cloud-native CPUs' as '云原生CPU'.
Ensure 'area and power efficient' is accurately rendered (面积与能效比高).
Preserve vendor-specific core branding carefully (Atom, Zen4c/Bergamo, Altra).

sections.title: The RL and Agentic Era
sections.previous_section_title: The AI GPU and CPU Consolidation Era
sections.section_role: Highlights the current market crisis where Reinforcement Learning and Agentic AI are exhausting CPU supplies, altering vendor pricing and supply chain strategies.
translation_notes: Translate 'Frontier AI labs' as '前沿AI实验室' and 'Agentic era' as '智能体时代'.
Ensure 'commodity x86 CPU servers' is translated to reflect standard, off-the-shelf hardware (商用/通用x86 CPU服务器).
Maintain the urgency and market tension in the phrasing of supply shortages and price hikes.

sections.title: History of Multi-Core CPU Interconnects
sections.section_role: Shifts the focus from market history to deep technical architecture, explaining how cores communicate on a die.
translation_notes: Hardware terminology must be strictly accurate: 'Interconnects' (互连架构), 'Crossbar' (交叉开关), 'Ring' (环形互连), 'Mesh' (网格互连).
Avoid translating 'core' as anything other than '核心' in this context.
